phase_name: Topic cache — train Nami's technical knowledge into local weights

last_result.hypothesis: HYP4: skip auto-memory MEMORY.md (-17 noisy bullets that shadow TOPIC_QA via first-seen dedup) + 3 short-form variants for numpy-grad/autochat. 45 min budget on 1181 clean chunks.
last_result.verdict: KEEP — bpb -7% vs HYP3 (0.1729→0.1602), persona recovered to 5/5, topic recall 14/16. Critical fix: AutoMLIR no longer leaks 'keep iterating, fall back' feedback — now produces verbatim '用LLM當tuner在MLIR pipeline 上自動找'. Source curation > variant addition for index-shadowed topics.
last_result.reason: 1181 chunks / 77KB / 979K params / ~30 epochs in 2772s. Net wins: AutoMLIR fixed, numpy-grad/autochat short-forms recovered. Minor regressions: HYP11 garbled, Aqua starting prefix drifted ('婕的水系姊妹' instead of '婕的AI夥伴Nami的水系姊妹'). 14/16 = best topic recall in Phase 5 — diminishing returns from here.
